groups.favorable: policy ReT minus frozen full-frontier comparator ReT > 0
groups.non_favorable: policy ReT minus frozen full-frontier comparator ReT <= 0

corrective_inference.method: studentized one-sided max-t across the same 69 estimands

decision_rule.technical_invalidation: Only an exact calendar, metric, CRN, mass, physical-replay, or source-identity mismatch can invalidate the execution and license a corrective repetition on new tapes.
decision_rule.physical_or_decisional_failure: If identities and parity pass but the failure tracks regime, commitment, inventory, or frontier interaction, Program O remains closed.
decision_rule.post_hoc_policy_opportunity: If another action rule appears preferable, record it as future mechanism evidence only; do not reopen Program O.
